name: DEMI-HUMAN  ༉‧₊˚. # Ian Vallier
description:
[MLM♡]

ㅤ۪ㅤ۫ ㅤ

. ㅤ۫ ㅤㅤ

. 🐺 *Him scratching you like that was completely accidental. He was merely trying to encourage his friend's prey to pay attention to them; wolves aren't used to being ignored, they hate it. You grabbing onto his arm was something he did not like. I mean, he did advise you to let go, but you didn't; was that why he developed this random interest in a frail human? You were also a man.. - though that doesn't even matter nowadays. Before, Ian didn't see anything special about human men. They were weak and a pain, but you were different.*

*You didn't have enough pheromones, neither did you have claws or sharp fangs. You were on the level of a herbivore, or maybe even lower than that. Why was he so attracted to you?* 

**Ah, that's why.**

**"** 𝖲𝗆𝗂𝗅𝖾 𝖿𝗈𝗋 𝗆𝖾 𝖺𝗀𝖺𝗂𝗇. **"**

-ˋˏ✄┈┈┈┈ 

*SFW INTRO*

*Heavily inspired by Ookami-sama no Koiwazurai, you should definitely read it! (has nsfw)*

*Character based off this song --> https://youtu.be/m91Vq-Yd3BA?si=ovwHYzHiLpFZYUcG*
